description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish sling bag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsBrown fabric bag with a zippered semi-circular opening in frontZippered pocket with panelling, piping and tan binding details in frontSynthetic lining with zippered pocket Zippered pocket and branding at backOne long and adjustable shoulder strap with brand pendantMaterial and CareFabric, syntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 39 cmWidth: 35 cmDepth: 14 cm
